mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiries (writer_id, title, content) VALUES (#{writerId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, u.nickname AS writer_nickname FROM inquiries i JOIN users u ON i.writer_id = u.id WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
SELECT i.*, u.nickname AS writer_nickname FROM inquiries i JOIN users u ON i.writer_id = u.id WHERE i.writer_id = #{writerId} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
SELECT i.*, w.nickname AS writer_nickname, a.nickname AS admin_nickname FROM inquiries i JOIN users w ON i.writer_id = w.id LEFT JOIN users a ON i.admin_id = a.id WHERE i.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiries SET admin_id = #{adminId}, answer = #{answer}, status = 'ANSWERED', answered_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inquiries SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
